hero.heading: Build, optimize, and scale your Shopify and fullstack web experience.
hero.subheading: Over 10 years delivering ecommerce, consulting, and product engineering solutions for businesses of all sizes.
hero.quote: Your storefront is only as strong as the experience behind it.

about.title: About Me
about.intro: I am a fullstack web developer with over 10 years of experience helping businesses ship performant, maintainable, and conversion-focused digital products.
about.focus: My core focus is fullstack development with deep Shopify platform expertise, from storefront optimization to custom app development.
highlights: Shopify architecture, theme, and app expertise

services.title: Services
services.intro: Practical, measurable support tailored to your stage and goals.

items.title: Shopify Ecommerce Services
items.description: Store setup, theme customization, performance tuning, checkout and UX improvements to increase revenue.

items.title: Technical Consulting
items.description: Hands-on support to optimize codebases, delivery processes, system architecture, and tool integrations.

items.title: Fullstack & Shopify App Development
items.description: End-to-end web and app development with modern React and Node.js stacks, including Shopify app builds.

items.title: Project-Based Delivery
items.description: Dedicated implementation for a defined scope and timeline through project completion.

items.title: Retainer Support
items.description: Reserved weekly or monthly engineering hours for ongoing development, maintenance, and advisory needs.

items.title: Performance & Accessibility Audits
items.description: Actionable audits for page speed and accessibility with prioritized recommendations your team can execute.

shopifyServicePage.title: Shopify Services
shopifyServicePage.intro: From performance tuning to custom app implementation, I help Shopify brands ship faster and scale with confidence.

items.title: Storefront Optimization
items.description: Improve Core Web Vitals, conversion flow, and UX consistency to create a faster and higher-converting storefront.

items.title: Theme Extension & Customization
items.description: Extend your Shopify theme with reusable sections, advanced merchandising features, and clean, maintainable code.

items.title: App Integrations
items.description: Integrate third-party tools for CRM, subscriptions, reviews, analytics, and operations with stable data flow.

items.title: Custom Shopify App Building
items.description: Build private or public Shopify apps tailored to your workflows, including admin tooling and backend services.

deliverables: Implementation with code quality and testing standards
Performance and accessibility checks before release

revealLines: I help teams turn technical chaos into scalable systems.
From faster Shopify storefronts to cleaner engineering workflows.
So your team can ship confidently and grow sustainably.

statsSection.title: Engineering improvements that your users and team can feel
statsSection.description: I focus on practical wins: faster page loads, smoother operations, and stronger accessibility standards that improve conversion and long-term maintainability.

stats.label: Typical page speed improvements after performance-focused optimization
Accessibility-first audits and remediation support for key user journeys
Hands-on fullstack and Shopify delivery across multiple business stages

coreServicesShowcase.title: Scroll to explore how I support ecommerce teams
coreServicesShowcase.description: As the object rotates, each service focus appears with a clear value proposition.

skillsSection.title: Skills & tooling
skillsSection.intro: Languages, frameworks, and Shopify depth I bring to storefronts, apps, and integrations.

pricingSection.title: Technical partnership that moves revenue, not a punch list
pricingSection.intro: For Shopify brands in the roughly $500K–$10M range—and agencies that need senior Shopify execution—ongoing retainers keep performance, conversion, and architecture from falling behind. Each tier is sized to a typical monthly capacity; we align on outcomes and priorities before work starts.

footerCta.title: Unsure which tier matches your roadmap?
footerCta.description: Share where revenue leaks, what’s slow, and what you’re launching next. I’ll recommend Foundation, Growth, Scale—or a custom program—in one conversation.
footerCta.label: Book a discovery call

tiers.name: Foundation
features: Checkout and PDP fixes that protect conversion instead of patching symptoms
Core Web Vitals and mobile UX improvements shoppers actually feel
Theme and integration guardrails so promos and apps don’t destabilize the storefront
Clear prioritization against revenue risk—not ad-hoc tickets with no owner
Async technical direction your internal team or agency can execute against
Monthly review of what shipped, what moved metrics, and what’s next

tiers.name: Growth
features: Faster iteration on merchandising, landing experiences, and post-purchase flows
Reliable app, data, and automation work that reduces manual ops and support load
Performance and reliability work tied to traffic spikes and revenue events
Architecture decisions that keep Shopify, headless edges, and backends coherent as you scale
Shared backlog with explicit tradeoffs so launches don’t slip silently
Direct access for stakeholders; tight loops with your lead dev or PM

tiers.name: Scale
features: Senior ownership across theme, custom app, and integration surfaces
Proactive hardening before BFCM, migrations, and major replatform moments
Technical due diligence on vendors, apps, and build-vs-buy calls
Scalable patterns for metafields, data, checkout, and admin workflows
Weekly leadership sync on risk, roadmap, and measurable storefront outcomes
White-glove collaboration with agencies or internal engineering leads

tiers.name: Custom
useCases: Performance and conversion audits with a prioritized remediation roadmap
Private or custom Shopify apps, admin tools, and integration layers
Multi-week implementation sprints with milestones tied to launch or revenue
Fractional technical leadership alongside your team or agency roster
tiers.howItWorks: We scope in writing—goals, constraints, success signals, and a fixed fee or staged milestones. You get clarity before commit; I own delivery against what we agreed.
tiers.footnote: Ideal when you need depth without an open-ended retainer, or when procurement requires a defined SOW.

faqs.question: What types of businesses do you work with?
faqs.answer: I work with businesses of any size, including brand-new stores and established teams that need technical support to scale.

faqs.question: Can you support both strategy and implementation?
faqs.answer: Yes. I can consult on architecture and process, then implement improvements across frontend, backend, and Shopify ecosystems.

faqs.question: Do you offer short-term and long-term engagement models?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can hire me for project-based work, fixed duration support, or an ongoing monthly/weekly retainer.

faqs.question: Can you audit existing products for performance and accessibility?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. I provide detailed page speed and accessibility audits with prioritized action items and optional implementation support.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Tell me about your store, app, or technical challenge and I will follow up with practical next steps.
contact.availability: Open to project work, consulting engagements, and retainer partnerships.
